---
title: "Introduction to Git and GitHub"
from: markdown+emoji
format:
  html:
    toc: false
page-layout: full
---

<style>

.section-cmd {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.72rem;
color: #aaa;
letter-spacing: 0.08em;
margin: 2.5rem 0 0;
padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
border-bottom: 1px solid #e4e4e4;
display: flex;
align-items: center;
gap: 6px;
}
.section-cmd .ps { color: #16a34a; }

.m-list { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }

.m-item {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 72px 1fr;
gap: 0 1.25rem;
padding: 6px 0;
border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
align-items: baseline;
}
.m-item:first-child { border-top: 1px solid #f0f0f0; }

.m-num {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.68rem;
color: #888;
letter-spacing: 0.03em;
white-space: nowrap;
padding-top: 1px;
line-height: 1.5;
}

.m-body {
font-size: 0.84rem;
font-weight: 300;
color: #333;
line-height: 1.5;
display: flex;
align-items: baseline;
flex-wrap: wrap;
gap: 0 0.4rem;
}

.m-sep {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.67rem;
color: #ccc;
}

.m-sub {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.67rem;
color: #888;
}

.m-link {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.65rem;
letter-spacing: 0.04em;
padding: 1px 8px;
border-radius: 2px;
text-decoration: none !important;
transition: all 0.12s;
background: #111;
color: #fff !important;
white-space: nowrap;
}
.m-link:hover {
background: #16a34a !important;
color: #fff !important;
text-decoration: none !important;
}

.concepts {
margin-top: 2rem;
padding-top: 1rem;
border-top: 1px solid #e4e4e4;
}

.concepts-list {
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
}

.concept-item {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: 120px 1fr;
gap: 0 1.25rem;
padding: 6px 0;
border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
align-items: baseline;
}
.concept-item:first-child { border-top: 1px solid #f0f0f0; }

.concept-key {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.68rem;
color: #16a34a;
letter-spacing: 0.03em;
white-space: nowrap;
}

.concept-val {
font-size: 0.84rem;
font-weight: 300;
color: #333;
line-height: 1.5;
}

.concept-val span {
font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
font-size: 0.67rem;
color: #888;
}

</style>

Version control and collaborative coding with Git and GitHub. Learn essential commands, branching workflows, and best practices for reproducible research and software development.

---

<div class="section-cmd"><span class="ps">$</span> ls parts/</div>

<div class="m-list">

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">part-01</div>
<div class="m-body">
Installation &amp; Setup
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">installing Git, GitHub account, SSH keys</span>
&nbsp;<a href="section 1/section1.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">part-02</div>
<div class="m-body">
Git &amp; GitHub Basics
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">repositories, commits, version control fundamentals</span>
&nbsp;<a href="section 2/section 2.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">part-03</div>
<div class="m-body">
Branching &amp; Merging
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">branches, pull requests, collaborative workflows</span>
&nbsp;<a href="section 3/section 3.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">part-04</div>
<div class="m-body">
Command Reference
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">clone, add, commit, push, pull, and more</span>
&nbsp;<a href="section 4/section 4.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">part-05</div>
<div class="m-body">
Workflows
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">feature branches, team collaboration, best practices</span>
&nbsp;<a href="section 5/section 5.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

<div class="m-item">
<div class="m-num">part-06</div>
<div class="m-body">
Additional Resources
<span class="m-sep">·</span><span class="m-sub">tutorials, cheat sheets, further reading</span>
&nbsp;<a href="section 6/section 6.html" class="m-link">view</a>
</div>
</div>

</div>


<div class="concepts">
<div class="section-cmd" style="margin-top:0"><span class="ps">$</span> cat key-concepts.md</div>
<div class="concepts-list">

<div class="concept-item">
<div class="concept-key">version-control</div>
<div class="concept-val">Track changes, revert to previous states, and maintain a complete project history <span>· git log, git diff, git checkout</span></div>
</div>

<div class="concept-item">
<div class="concept-key">collaboration</div>
<div class="concept-val">Work with teams through branches, pull requests, and code reviews <span>· git branch, git merge, git PR</span></div>
</div>

<div class="concept-item">
<div class="concept-key">distributed</div>
<div class="concept-val">Clone repositories, work locally, and synchronize with remotes <span>· git clone, git fetch, git push</span></div>
</div>

<div class="concept-item">
<div class="concept-key">open-source</div>
<div class="concept-val">Fork repositories, contribute to projects, and participate in the global dev community <span>· git fork, git PR</span></div>
</div>

</div>
</div>
